description: Beautifully designed Sullivan Station home featuring elegant textured walls, a striking stone fireplace feature wall, and a custom wall insert for a hutch in the spacious dining room. The bright kitchen offers a large window, double sinks, Electrolux cooktop, double wall ovens, beverage fridge, and an oversized island opening to the inviting family room — perfect for daily living and entertaining. Enjoy the generous balcony ideal for gatherings. Upstairs, the large primary bedroom includes a walk-in closet and spa-inspired ensuite with double sinks, makeup table, and oversized shower. The basement features a versatile flex room or extra bedroom with a full bathroom. Close to excellent schools, parks, shopping, and easy access to Hwy 10 for commuters.
